top.title: Mobile Post-Message Actions UI
top.description:
Post Message actions = "View Sources", download, copy, thumbs up, thumbs down, refresh
On mobile, the "view sources" gets cut off.  
When the screen is less than 450px wide, we should stack the "View sources" button and the rest of the buttons.

top.title: Mobile UI
top.description: This is the parent ticket for all of the mobile issues. I'm going to try to keep them separated for the most part so we can more easily make sure we're not stepping on anyone else's toes.

top.title: Drafts - RFE - do not include RFE in exhibit list toggle off
top.description: In the exhibit list interface, either do not have the RFE document itself appear in the exhibit list or have it appear but with the include in exhibit list toggled off. Either option is fine, although the second one is preferred.

top.title: Simplify upload status polling: move completion logic to backend

top.title: bug: UI - stop checking the bulk-status endpoint for drafts that are already done
top.description: All of these drafts are in a finalized state. The state won't change while we are sitting on the page. When all drafts are in a final state - Failed or Draft Complete - then do not continue to call the draft status API at /api/v1/drafts/bulk-status

top.title: Bug: can't scroll to the bottom item in the drafts list page
top.description: Create a bunch of drafts. Go to one of them and try to upload files. While they are uploading, click the 'continue later' button to get back to the list. Scroll to the bottom.
